summary: Refined the daily email front-end after the controlled manual Release plus Gmail SMTP test passed so the next email uses a human-scannable Chinese layout, compact arXiv subject, 12-second video link, concise evidence, action guidance, candidate queue summary, and hides ROI scoring in backend artifacts.
scope: candidate queue front-end summary without visible ROI score
non_scope: no new SMTP send in this formatting commit
no direct GitHub Release upload outside the manual workflow
model_delta: Refines MOD-ADP-034 to adp-manual-delivery-test-v1.2 for human front-end email formatting.
formula_delta: Refreshes FORM-ADP-036 with YYYYMMDD arXiv subject, Chinese section layout, hidden visible ROI score, concise evidence, and 12-second video link requirements.
parameter_delta: Adds PARAM-ADP-186 for the daily email human front-end format contract.
tests_run: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/codex_adp_email_fmt_all_final PYTHONPATH=arxiv-daily-push/src python3 -m unittest discover -s arxiv-daily-push/tests -q
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/codex_adp_email_fmt_root_final2 PYTHONPATH=arxiv-daily-push/src python3 -m unittest discover -s tests/governance -p 'test_*.py' -q
